creator: ac199@hwcn.org
text:
On Sun, 6 Sep 1998 shige@kuis.kyoto-u.ac.jp wrote:

> +PERL_VERSION=	5.00404
> +PERL_VER=	5.004
> +PLIST_SUB+=	PERL_VERSION=${PERL_VERSION} PERL_VER=${PERL_VER}

Don't use '+=' for first assignment to variable in port Makefile.
Use just '='.

(You do not need to resubmit the PR --- the committer will fix
this).


-- 
This .sig is not innovative, witty, or profund.
